title: Database Administrator I
description:
Notion powers workspaces for 100M+ people globally. We've reinvented how teams organize, plan, and execute work—from solopreneurs to Fortune 500 companies.

We're seeking a Database Administrator I to join our Productivity team in Omaha. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Manage database infrastructure including installation, configuration, and optimization
Monitor database performance and implement tuning recommendations
Implement backup and disaster recovery strategies
Manage user access and security protocols
Troubleshoot database issues and coordinate with application teams
Maintain documentation of database configurations and procedures

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years in database administration or systems engineering
